meaning: n.屈臂挥拳向上一击v.曲臂挥拳向上直击
examples: Have the straight and uppercut, many changes.
He was knocked down by an uppercut from Eubank.
Fixed a bug where frozen beholder disappears for a while when hit from uppercut attack.
He acted impulsively (always swinging for the fences in a wild uppercut).
The fight started at a ferocious pace, Macklin working well to the body while Moore enjoyed early success with the right uppercut.
